summary: Diagnostic-only TCBarcode logs were added for the bridge, main dispatch, object state, capture lifecycle, presentation, metadata callback, cancellation, and caller wait; barcode values are not logged.
limitation: No physical iOS device or deployed minimal test application was available, so no freeze reproduction, thread dump, camera capture, Xcode build, or device validation was performed.

command: xcrun xctrace list devices; find TotalCrossVM/xcode/Debug-iphonesimulator -maxdepth 4 -type f -name TotalCross -perm -111 -print
summary: Xcode tooling listed the host and iOS simulators only; the scoped executable search returned no deployed TotalCross application.
limitation: A simulator is insufficient evidence for the reported physical-camera freeze; connect an iOS device and deploy the minimal scanner application before continuing milestone 1.
